description_long: This all-terrain vehicle is a highly specialized, six-wheeled robotic rover with a robust, angular chassis and a variety of mounted scientific instruments. The body is predominantly white with metallic and black accents, featuring articulated suspension arms for each wheel, allowing for superior maneuverability over rough terrain. The front of the vehicle is equipped with a prominent sensor mast and camera system, while a large articulated robotic arm extends from one side, ending in a complex tool cluster. The wheels are large, rugged, and feature deep, blocky treads designed for maximum traction on uneven surfaces. The rear section houses additional equipment and what appears to be a power or communications module, with visible cabling and structural supports. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a focus on durability and functionality in challenging environments.
description: A six-wheeled, white robotic all-terrain vehicle with articulated suspension, a sensor mast, and a large robotic arm, designed for rugged environments. Its exposed mechanical parts and blocky treaded wheels emphasize durability and advanced functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sensor mast, camera system, and the symmetrical arrangement of the six wheels with visible suspension arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the vehicle, the articulated robotic arm, and the detailed suspension system for each wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel, additional equipment modules, and the robust wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the robotic arm's reach, the chassis profile, and the rear-mounted equipment.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a deep, blocky, all-terrain tread pattern designed for maximum grip and stability on loose or uneven surfaces.
